functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Yellow Jellyfish Guide
pages:
Yellow Jellyfish Guide

A Choascraft guide for yellow jellyfish facts, hazards, parts, and jellyfish gear.

Fact 1

Jellyfish are soft-bodied animals with no bones, brain, or heart.

Fact 2

Most jellyfish drift with currents, but they can pulse their bell to move through water.

Fact 3

Their tentacles can carry stinging cells used for defense and catching prey.

Fact 4

Some jellyfish live near the surface, while others drift in deeper water.

Fact 5

Jellyfish sense light, gravity, and touch with simple nerve structures.

Fact 6

Even without a brain, jellyfish can respond quickly to their surroundings.

Choascraft Yellow Jellyfish

Yellow jellyfish are one of the jellyfish variants chosen by the master jellyfish spawner.

Hazard

Jellyfish hurt nearby non-jellyfish mobs with area damage. Give them room in the water.

Movement

Jellyfish swim, wander, idle, avoid threats, and flock with other water mobs.

Parts

Jellyfish parts are used for colored jellyfish armor. Yellow gear uses Yellow Jelly.

Rare Parts

Jelly Pearl and Jelly Cyst are important rare parts for stronger jellyfish equipment.

Crafting Key

I = Iron Ingot
J = matching Jelly
P = Jelly Pearl
C = Jelly Cyst

Helmet

Pattern:
III
IJI
JPJ

Result: matching Jellyfish Helmet

Chestplate

Pattern:
IPI
JCJ
III

Result: matching Jellyfish Chestplate

Leggings

Pattern:
III
IPI
IJI

Result: matching Jellyfish Leggings

Boots

Pattern:
IJI
IJI
IPI

Result: matching Jellyfish Boots

Netherite

Use a smithing table with jellyfish armor and a netherite ingot to upgrade it.

Diver Note

Yellow jellyfish are bright warnings in the water. Admire first, approach never.
